description.unified: Attacks the enemy with the lowest M.DEF 3 times, dealing a total of ??? M.DMG and inflicting stun for [0.6 sec->1 sec], and if the target is under 'Target Lock On', target takes additional ??? M.DMG. The last attack inflicts 'Target Lock On' on the enemy for 10 sec. [(added) Lock On cannot be dispelled, and the target's M.Block rate has decreased by 500.]

Deals ??? M.DMG to target enemy and other enemies in range, and Stuns them for [1.2 sec->2 sec]. Then moves to an ally with the [highest DMG dealt->lowest P.DEF], excluding self, and creates Shield for two that can block ??? DMG for [6 sec->10 sec]. [(added) Gains immunity to CC while the Shield lasts.] [(removed) increases Status Resistance by 60%]

Moves to an enemy with the lowest HP, deals ??? M.DMG then returns to the furthest ally. If the enemy is not a hero, deals ??? additional M.DMG [(added) that ignores DEF]. Defeating a target with this skill instantly triggers ['Check & Guard'->'Restrain and Protect'].

If an enemy is inflicted by [Target Lock On], ATK increases by ??? and all attacks skills prioritize Locked On enemies. When the Locked On enemies dies, [Target Lock On] is inflicted on another enemy for 10 sec. [(removed) Target Lock On: Increases M.DMG taken by 20%]

light.unified: When there are enemies inflicted by **Skill 1**, Crit Chance is increased by [300->400].

dark.unified: Receives [ {2}% -> 30% ] reduced DMG when enemy is inflicted by **Skill 1**.

description.unified: [Target Lock On] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces the target's M.Crit Resistance by [160->500] for 10 sec.
[Restrain and Protect] Reduces Mana Cost by [1000->1] and upon Crit hit recovers {0} Mana.
[Assassination] DMG is increased by 50% and upon Crit Hit increases own ATK by {0}% for [14 sec->10 sec].
[Target Eliminated] Increases ATK boost by 50%. Every 5 sec, stuns enemies under Target Lock On for {0} sec.
Increases ATK Spd by [{1} stacks of 1%->{0}] and attacks on Locked On enemies, dealing [{0}%->{1}%] of ATK as extra M.DMG. Extra damage effect occurs once in [1 sec->2 sec].

Places Endless Acceleration, Riventina on the ground for 10 sec. Endless Acceleration, Riventina attacks the enemy with the lowest M.DEF, dealing ??? M.DMG and inflicting Target Lock On. Afterward, attacks the enemy every [3 sec->few sec], dealing ??? M.DMG and inflicting stun for [1.2 sec->2 sec]. All effects prioritize the enemy inflicted with Target Lock On.

1.from: For the duration, increases Mirianne’s Crit DMG by 72%.
1.to: Upon activation, Increases Mirianne's Crit DMG by 100% and ACC by 300 for 10 sec.
1.unified: Upon activation, Increases Mirianne's Crit DMG by [72%->100%] and [(added) ACC by 300] for 10 sec.

2.from: For the duration, increases [Assassination] DMG by 50%.
2.to: Upon activation, [Assassination] ignores the enemy's DEF, and Increases its DMG by 30% for 10 sec.
2.unified: Upon activation, [Assassination] [(added) ignores the enemy's DEF, and] Increases its DMG by [50%->30%] for 10 sec.
